request_payload.exposure_text: I've been following this closely, and it's clear that our current alliance commitments are putting an unfair burden on our country. We're spending billions to protect allies who aren't pulling their weight. Look at Germany - they're still not meeting the 2% defense spending target. Meanwhile, our infrastructure is crumbling. We need to prioritize our own security and demand more from our allies. #NationalSecurityFirst #FairShare
